title: [Bug]:  `select count()` 有概率出现预期之外的结果
description: master分支版本，`select count()` 返回了预期之外的数值
poc: CREATE RESOURCE UNIT 4c7g MAX_CPU 4, MIN_CPU 4, MEMORY_SIZE '7G';
create resource pool pool_test unit='4c7g', unit_num=1, zone_list=('zone1' ,'zone2', 'zone3');
create tenant test resource_pool_list=('pool_test'), primary_zone='RANDOM',comment 'test tenant', charset='utf8' set ob_tcp_invited_nodes='%', recyclebin=OFF, ob_query_timeout=5000000;
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(255), value DECIMAL(10, 2), created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, name, value) VALUES (1, 'test1', 10.50);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, name, value) VALUES (2, NULL, 20.75);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, name, value) VALUES (3, 'test3', NULL);
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL;
